episodes.title: #34 - Isabella Young - How to survive in a cult
episodes.description: In this conversation, Isabella Young shares her harrowing journey from a dysfunctional childhood, through a traumatic marriage, and into a cult, revealing the psychological manipulation and control she faced. She discusses her awakening to the reality of her situation, the tragic loss of her son that catalyzed her escape, and her ongoing healing process. Isabella emphasizes the importance of self-love, emotional expression, and reconnecting with nature as vital components of her recovery. She also highlights the broader implications of cult dynamics in society and the need for awareness and healing. Chapters: (00:00) The Cult of Dysfunction: Early Life and Family Dynamics (02:51) A Journey into Spirituality: Finding a New Path (05:58) The Ashram Experience: Entering the Cult (08:40) The Dark Side of Belief: Abuse and Control (11:27) Breaking Free: The Path to Liberation (17:44) Healing and Rebuilding: Life After the Cult (23:13) Embracing Nature: The Key to Recovery (27:29) Sharing the Journey: Tools for Transformation Isabella's Book: https://amzn.to/3LjAUgn More: https://life-decoded.com
